description: Send notifications to your own Notifiarr destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise notifiarr:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Notifiarr apprise notification payload delivered straight to notifiarr.com.
name: msg-to-notifiarr

request.template: {"urls":"notifiarr://${ customer_secrets.NOTIFIARR_APIKEY }/${ customer_secrets.NOTIFIARR_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"notifiarr://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
